weightingGuidance: Higher weight on: GDV reconciliation, development margin calculation, GST treatment, settlement timing, contingency adequacy, lifecycle phases.

sourceModelSummary.model_purpose: A development and operating financial model for THE BEND Live House, a live music venue project in Melbourne, used to project cashflows, financing needs, debt serviceability and equity investor returns.
sourceModelSummary.industry: entertainment venue development and operations (live music venue)
sourceModelSummary.periodicity: annual (FY, July-June) with construction phase tracked to monthly/period level
sourceModelSummary.timeline: Model runs from Feb 2025 (planning/design) through construction in FY27, operations commencing 1 July 2027 (FY28), to a 12-year model horizon ending around FY38/2038.
key_drivers: Event days and venue hire pricing across music/EDM/comedy categories (VHA revenue)
Bank debt facility ($12.68m at 8% over 10 years) and its repayment profile
Construction capex and timeline (Consultants, Structure, Civil, ICT, FF&E, Services)
Exit EBITDA multiple (7.0x) and WACC used for terminal valuation and NPV
Scenario multipliers for revenue, cost, capex, delay and inflation

sheet_map.Readme: Index describing purpose of each tab, distinguishing live/authoritative tabs from navigation and backup tabs.
sheet_map.KEY OUTPUTS >>: Navigation-only divider tab with no calculations.
sheet_map.General Information: Narrative project description of the venue concept; documentation only, not linked to financials.
sheet_map.Equity Dashboard: Investor-facing outputs including IRR, MOIC, NPV sensitivity to WACC and exit multiple, and funding deployment.
sheet_map.Debt Dashboard: Lender-facing metrics: revenue, EBITDA, closing cash, total debt, DSCR and ICR by fiscal year.
sheet_map.Dashboard (backup): Archived values-only snapshot of dashboard metrics, explicitly non-authoritative.
sheet_map.Cashflow: Annual cashflow waterfall including equity/debt drawdowns, opening/closing cash reconciliation.
sheet_map.P&L: Profit and loss statement with construction/ops flags and revenue line items (VHA, Premium Sales, Premium F&B).
sheet_map.Balance Sheet: Balance sheet with cash, restricted community fund reserve, receivables, inventory and lease deposits.
sheet_map.Valuation: DCF and valuation assumptions including WACC, cost of equity/debt, tax rate, exit multiple, project IRR and NPV.
sheet_map.Inputs: Master input sheet covering project timing, lease assumptions, and other core drivers feeding the model.
sheet_map.Revenue Assumptions: Venue hire pricing tiers by event type (Music GA, EDM, Comedy, Seated) and capacity assumptions.
sheet_map.Expense Assumptions: Staffing roles, salaries, on-costs, mobilisation costs and pre-operational expense buildup.
sheet_map.Construction Timeline: Capex breakdown by category (Consultants, Structure, Civil, ICT, FF&E, Services, Finance).
sheet_map.Scenarios: Scenario toggle sheet with revenue/cost/capex/inflation multipliers and delay assumptions for Base/Optimistic/Pessimistic cases.
sheet_map.Financial Summary: Consolidated P&L and balance sheet summary by fiscal year with totals.
sheet_map.Financial Summary (backup): Archived duplicate of the Financial Summary sheet.
sheet_map.Debt: Debt schedule with facility terms, opening balances, start/end flags and repayment tracking.
sheet_map.GST Calculation: GST computation on revenue and costs at 10%, likely feeding cash flow timing.
sheet_map.Calendar Assumptions: Event days per year by event category, capacity and sell-through percentages.
sheet_map.Partnership Assumptions: Sponsorship tiers, naming rights, value-in-kind terms and equity ownership/waterfall notes.
sheet_map.Legend: Empty sheet, likely formatting legend placeholder.
sheet_map.Timing: Empty sheet, referenced elsewhere as authoritative timing source but no visible content.
sheet_map.Original Capex: Pre-operational funding sources (Founder, Industry Partners, PE Investment, Bank, Partnership Deposits) by period.
sheet_map.Disclaimer: Legal disclaimer and version control notice for the model.
sheet_map.Inputs for Dashboard: Linked metrics feeding dashboards (WACC, Ke, exit multiple, tax rate, IRR, active scenario).
sheet_map.For Deck: Summary debt and equity metrics formatted for presentation deck use.
sheet_map.For Teaser Deck: Key headline metrics (IRR, MOIC, DSCR, LTV/LTC, stress tests) for investor teaser materials.
sheet_map.GANTT - MASTER OPTION: Presentation-only construction programme/Gantt chart, explicitly non-authoritative for dates.
sheet_map.Audit QA: Remediation register template for audit findings; largely empty content shown.
sheet_map.Assumption Register: Register of unsupported/external-reliance assumptions (DSRA, BAS frequency, exit multiple) with status tracking.
sheet_map.Model Checks: Live validation gates and control checks (formula errors, key rate/switch tracking) with pass/fail status.
sheet_map.Redundant Input Review: Audit closure documentation reviewing static-scan items and classifying zero/redundant inputs as intentional.
sheet_map.Validation Closure: Governance register tracking audit findings by priority and closure status across remediation batches.
sheet_map.Change Log: Log of model remediation changes with change ID, sheet/range affected, reason and validation retest evidence.
sheet_map.Accounting & COA Map: Accounting policy and simplification notes; explicitly states no formal chart of accounts or GL was supplied.

immediate_observations: Multiple audit/governance tabs (Audit QA, Assumption Register, Model Checks, Validation Closure, Change Log, Redundant Input Review) suggest this model has already undergone prior audit remediation cycles, which is unusual and should be scrutinized for whether fixes are genuine or cosmetic.
Equity Dashboard contains corrupted-looking date values (e.g. year +057503, +167946) in what should be numeric or date cells, indicating broken formulas or formatting errors.

Dashboard (backup) and Financial Summary (backup) show materially different EBITDA and Closing Cash figures than the live Equity/Debt Dashboard and Financial Summary sheets for the same years, raising reconciliation concerns.
PE Equity Tranche is labeled INACTIVE DEBT / CLASSIFIED AS EQUITY on the Debt sheet, suggesting a reclassification that needs verification against Cashflow and Balance Sheet treatment.
DSRA (Debt Service Reserve) is toggled off per Assumption Register and For Teaser Deck, meaning no reserve account despite lender-facing DSCR/ICR metrics being presented.
Assumption Register flags 6 critical unconfirmed items including BAS frequency, DSRA sizing, and exit multiple support, indicating key external validations are still outstanding.
Construction Timeline sheet has minimal data with null Finance capex line, and GANTT tab explicitly states it is not authoritative for dates, so timeline consistency across sheets needs checking.
Timing and Legend sheets are empty despite being referenced as sources elsewhere in the model, which could indicate broken links or incomplete population.
sourceModelSummary.data_quality: medium — core financial statements and dashboards appear structurally complete with formula-driven linkages, but there are visible anomalies (corrupted date values, backup/live discrepancies, empty referenced sheets) and multiple self-identified unresolved audit items
sourceModelSummary.validation_focus: Reconcile live Dashboard/Financial Summary figures against their backup counterparts to explain discrepancies; verify Equity Dashboard sensitivity table formulas causing corrupted date outputs; confirm PE tranche debt-vs-equity classification flows consistently through Cashflow, Debt and Balance Sheet; test DSCR/ICR and debt repayment schedule integrity given DSRA is off; validate that Timing and Construction Timeline sheets (cited as authoritative) are complete and consistent with GANTT and P&L construction flags; and assess whether prior audit remediation items in Assumption Register and Model Checks are genuinely closed versus only documented as closed.
